info.name: AmakaziWatch API v3 - Complete
info.description:
Kenya's first crowdsourced GBV awareness, reporting and prevention platform.

Set base_url = http://127.0.0.1:8000
After login, paste access token into the access_token variable.
For Intelligence endpoints use X-API-Key header instead of Bearer token.

COMPLETE API INCLUDES:
- Authentication (JWT + Google OAuth + 2FA)
- Profile & RBAC (5 Roles)
- Reports & Statistics
- Safety (Timer, Safe Word, Risk Assessment, Escape Plan)
- Document Vault (Evidence Storage)
- Peer Support (Chat)
- Legal Rights Bot (English/Swahili)
- Organizations & Reviews
- Organization Coordination (Inventory, Case Matching, Messaging)
- Content & Education
- Awareness Campaigns
- Virtual Workshops
- Anonymous Tips
- County Scorecards
- Admin Operations
- Terms & Privacy
- Intelligence API (API Keys, Analytics)
- Notifications
- Panic Button
- Language Switching
- AI Chat
- Subscriptions & Plans
- Payments (M-Pesa, Paystack, Card)
- Donations
- Licensing
- FAQ & Resources
- Success Stories
- Heatmap
- Quizzes
- Donations & Fundraising
- Licensing & Compliance
